success: Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going!
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hardwork: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
Dreams don't work unless you do.
positive: Every day is a new beginning.
Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
Small steps in the right direction can turn out to be the biggest journey of your life.
You are stronger than you think.
life: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
Life is short, make it sweet.
Life is 10% what happens and 90% how you react.
education: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you.
Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.

motivational_stories.abraham_lincoln: Failed in business at 21, defeated in Senate at 22, lost Senate race at 24, elected President at 52.
motivational_stories.drake: Failed 3 times in exams, became one of India's biggest stars.
motivational_stories.satyanad: Failed many times, never gave up, became India's biggest industrialist.

affirmations: I am capable of achieving my goals.
I am stronger than any obstacle.
I am in charge of my own happiness.
Every day I am getting closer to my dreams.
I have the power to change my life.
I am grateful for everything I have.
